data: {"generalSituation":"A trough of low pressure will form over central China and develop into a cold front gradually today and tomorrow. The cold front is expected to move across the coast of southern China later tomorrow, bringing showers and squally thunderstorms to the region. Under the influence of the associated northeast monsoon, it will be slightly cooler over the coast of Guangdong early next week. A fresh easterly airstream will affect the region midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260502","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"East to southeast force 3 to 4, occasionally force 5 offshore at first, up to force 6 on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with one or two showers.
